fact_nuggets.text: Tangling Hair (Japanese: Curly Hair) is an Ability introduced in Generation VII. It is the signature Ability of Alolan Diglett and Alolan Dugtrio.
Signature Ability of Alolan Diglett And Alolan Dugtrio

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with this Ability is hit by a move that makes contact , the Speed of the attacking Pokemon is decreased by one stage. If a Pokemon with this Ability is hit by a multistrike move that makes contact (such as Fury Swipes ), each hit activates this Ability. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Tangling Hair has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with this Ability is hit by a move that makes contact , the Speed of the attacking Pokemon is decreased by one stage. If a Pokemon with this Ability is hit by a multistrike move that makes contact (such as Fury Swipes ), each hit activates this Ability.
When this Pokemon takes regular damage from a contact move, the attacking Pokemon's Speed lowers by one stage.
